steps.description: Click the "Extensions" icon in the left sidebar of the Visual Studio Code interface to open the Extensions panel.
Type text 'm365 agents toolkit' into the search input field in the Extensions: Marketplace panel of Visual Studio Code.
Click the "Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit" extension entry in the Visual Studio Code Extensions Marketplace sidebar, directly below the search bar after searching for "m365 agents toolkit".
@assertion "What is Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit" exists in the Details tab.
@assertion the image inside the Details tab displays normally
Click the "Teams Toolkit" hyperlink in the description section of the "Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit" extension details page within the Visual Studio Code Marketplace interface.
@assertion The content in the DETAILS tab can be displayed normally.
